position_summary: Claude's final position is materially correct: the v1.2 cleanup landed in the repository file, and the earlier correctness blockers are resolved. The outline is build-ready for the methods+demonstration paper modulo the §8.2 operator decision, with one minor metadata inconsistency newly exposed.

findings.title: Top-level title still labels the artifact as v1/pre-debate despite v1.2 changelog
findings.evidence: `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:1` says `Wayfinder manuscript - working outline (v1, pre-debate)`, while `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:15-19` records the v1.2 changelog and round-2 cleanup.
findings.concern_path: A reviewer or future drafting pass could treat the header as stale provenance and wonder whether the file is the pre-debate outline or the post-debate build plan. This does not affect scientific claims, but it is an internal consistency blemish.
findings.suggested_action: Retitle line 1 to v1.2/post-debate or remove the version from the title and rely on the changelog.

dropped_findings.rationale: Resolved. CTLA4 no longer appears as a ledger/refuted exemplar: §0 scope says `CTLA4 excluded` at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:42-43`; §4.2 explicitly says CTLA4 was dropped and only notes the separate Rest artifact with condition/disease scope at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:137-140`; C17 says CTLA4 is removed/supported in the perturbseq-qc source at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:248`.

Resolved. The stale `proves the referee discriminates` phrase is absent. The headline says the ledger `demonstrates` discrimination on worked examples and is not an accuracy benchmark at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:39-40`; §4.1 repeats demonstration, not validated precision/recall, at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:127-130`.
Resolved. C1-C8 cite `stage1/sweep_Stim8hr.json` as primary at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:232-239`; C9-C10 cite `stage1/lbd_questions_Stim8hr.json:48-58` at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:240-241`.

Resolved. The exact stale phrase `receipt at every hop against a held experimental substrate` is absent. The headline names perturbation-substrate receipts for KD/effect/program and association/enrichment receipt for disease at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:35-37`; §2.2 repeats the two receipt classes and disease-hop caveat at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:90-94`.

Resolved. F-011 handling is explicit: Stage-1 JSON is for numeric values only, manuscript-facing prose cites post-critic Stage-5 receipt/chain JSON, and the pre/post critic diff is preserved as the self-audit at `docs/manuscript/OUTLINE.md:221-228`.
